comment: List of sample question packs. The admin app lists each pack in the 'Browse sample packs' modal, then loads the pack's `url` when an operator picks one. Bundled packs use the bundled:samples/ scheme; hosted manifests can use public https:// pack URLs.

packs.title: Omega Quiz
packs.description: 10-question phishing awareness round + 5 tiebreaker questions. The default pack — covers look-alike domains, BEC, smishing, MFA, post-click response.

packs.title: Nature Quiz
packs.description: Short illustrative pack about wildlife and ecosystems. Replace with your own once you've forked the repo.

packs.title: Pop Culture Quiz
packs.description: Movies, music, and TV — a lighter-weight pack for team-building events.
